# Protein Index

> A searchable index of proteins.

## Product


## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://protein.significanthobbies.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://protein.significanthobbies.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://protein.significanthobbies.com/llms.txt)

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
